manual_recovery_notes: LoRA orchestrator fire crashed mid-cell 4 at 17:53 UTC with OSError EIO on FUSE checkpoint save (peft create_or_update_model_card -> huggingface_hub repocard.save atomic-rename on MooseFS F_SETLKW). Original orchestrator manifest at artifacts/runpod/20260517T172550Z/ captured the failed portion ($0.89 / 36min). RECOVERY: X9 code fix landed locally (commit 1170805), pushed updated train_rung.py + train_modernbert.py to pod via rsync, manually launched 'for fold in 1 2 3; do python scripts/train_rung.py --rung lora --fold-only $fold --checkpoint-staging-root /root/training_staging; done' in nohup at 18:11 UTC. Cells 4-12 (re-trained cell 4 + cells 5-12 new) completed at 19:22:12 UTC. All 24 parquets safe on disk. wall_time_sec covers 18:11:11 -> 19:22:12 (71 min); estimated_cost = 71/60 * $1.49 = $1.76. Idle 18-min gap (17:53-18:11) used for X9 code fix + commit + rsync code to pod; that downtime not attributed to any manifest.
